name: Franco Caballero
title: Web Developer
professional_profile_desc1: Fullstack Web Developer with over 7 years of experience building scalable, business-oriented applications. Specialized in modern JavaScript (React, Next.js, Node.js) and robust backend architectures.
professional_profile_desc2: I have worked in corporate environments and startups, developing educational platforms, APIs, internal systems, and e-commerce solutions optimized for performance and SEO.
goal: I seek to participate in challenging projects where I can contribute technical vision, leadership, and continuous improvement.
job1_desc: Consulting and development of web applications and API services in Node and React at Front-end/Back-end level.
job2_desc: Development and optimization of web systems for teachers using Java Spring Boot.
job3_desc: Development of applications and websites in Laravel. Front-end markup and optimization. Web server maintenance.
job4_desc: Development of applications and websites (Front-end and Back-end). Development of banners and mailings for campaigns and/or accounts.
job5_desc: Service provision in various projects, including:
job5_list1: Intradevco Web for Coronel Smith, Back-end.
job5_list2: Interbank Benefit Web for Amable Perú and Interbank, Front-end.
job5_list3: Los Portales Web for Staff Creativa, Front-end.
job5_list4: Landing 100 años de Cemento Sol for Coronel Smith, Front-end.
job6_company: Instituto Científico del Pacifico, San Miguel, Lima
job6_list1: Analysis, design, development and optimization of custom websites in CMS (Drupal, Wordpress, Moodle) and internal systems in PHP.
job6_list2: Analysis and design of the company's internal database.
job6_list3: Implementation of new technologies for company improvement.
